tool_input.content:
#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Clean up ~/.claude/[REDACTED] enabledPlugins to only keep essentials."""

import json
import shutil
import os
from datetime import datetime

SETTINGS_PATH = os.path.expanduser("~/.claude/[REDACTED]")

# Essential plugins this project actually needs
KEEP_PLUGINS = {
    "axme-code@claude-community",
    "hipocampus@claude-community",
    "rtfm",
    "aura-frog@claude-community",
    "codegraph",
    "superpowers@claude-plugins-official",
    "superpowers@claude-community",
}

backup = SETTINGS_PATH + f".backup-{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')}"
shutil.copy2(SETTINGS_PATH, backup)
print(f"Backed up to: {backup}")

with open(SETTINGS_PATH) as f:
    data = json.load(f)

old_count = len(data.get("enabledPlugins", {}))
print(f"Original enabled plugins: {old_count}")

new_plugins = {}
for key in data.get("enabledPlugins", {}):
    keep = any(pattern in key for pattern in KEEP_PLUGINS)
    new_plugins[key] = keep

kept = sum(1 for v in new_plugins.values() if v)
disabled = sum(1 for v in new_plugins.values() if not v)
print(f"Kept enabled: {kept}")
print(f"Set to disabled: {disabled}")

data["enabledPlugins"] = new_plugins

with open(SETTINGS_PATH, "w") as f:
    json.dump(data, f, indent=2)

print("Done. Restart Claude Code for changes to take effect.")
print("\nKept plugins:")
for k in sorted(new_plugins):
    if new_plugins[k]:
        print(f"  OK {k}")

#!/usr/bin/env python3
"""Clean up ~/.claude/[REDACTED] enabledPlugins to only keep essentials."""

import json
import shutil
import os
from datetime import datetime

SETTINGS_PATH = os.path.expanduser("~/.claude/[REDACTED]")

# Essential plugins this project actually needs
KEEP_PLUGINS = {
    "axme-code@claude-community",
    "hipocampus@claude-community",
    "rtfm",
    "aura-frog@claude-community",
    "codegraph",
    "superpowers@claude-plugins-official",
    "superpowers@claude-community",
}

backup = SETTINGS_PATH + f".backup-{datetime.now().strftime('%Y%m%d-%H%M%S')}"
shutil.copy2(SETTINGS_PATH, backup)
print(f"Backed up to: {backup}")

with open(SETTINGS_PATH) as f:
    data = json.load(f)

old_count = len(data.get("enabledPlugins", {}))
print(f"Original enabled plugins: {old_count}")

new_plugins = {}
for key in data.get("enabledPlugins", {}):
    keep = any(pattern in key for pattern in KEEP_PLUGINS)
    new_plugins[key] = keep

kept = sum(1 for v in new_plugins.values() if v)
disabled = sum(1 for v in new_plugins.values() if not v)
print(f"Kept enabled: {kept}")
print(f"Set to disabled: {disabled}")

data["enabledPlugins"] = new_plugins

with open(SETTINGS_PATH, "w") as f:
    json.dump(data, f, indent=2)

print("Done. Restart Claude Code for changes to take effect.")
print("\nKept plugins:")
for k in sorted(new_plugins):
    if new_plugins[k]:
        print(f"  OK {k}")
